description: Multi-tool workflow: inspect an asset, plan edits, execute via transaction
text:
Step 1: Identify the target asset path
Step 2: Use asset_search() or asset_list() to find the asset
Step 3: Inspect its properties with the appropriate inspect tool (e.g., blueprint_inspect(), state_tree_inspect())
Step 4: Plan your changes based on the inspected state
Step 5: Begin a transaction with transaction_begin_group('description of changes')
Step 6: Apply changes using the appropriate edit tool
Step 7: Complete the transaction with transaction_end_group()
Step 8: Re-inspect to verify the changes took effect
